summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The First Trust Active Factor Large Cap Growth ETF (AFGR) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is actively managed to invest in large -cap US growth stocks. Using a multi-factor quantitative approach, the fund considers stocks exhibiting value, momentum, quality, and low volatility. AFGR was launched on Jul 21, 2020 and is issued by First Trust.
